recommendations.title: Buy Now! The Shopping Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: This subversive documentary unpacks the tricks brands use to keep their customers consuming — and the real impact they have on our lives and the world.

recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: Inside the Mind of a Cat
recommendations.overview: Cat experts dive into the mind of the feline to reveal the true capabilities of the pouncing pet in this captivating and cuddly documentary.

recommendations.title: Casting JonBenet
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after the modern world's most notorious child murder, the legacy of the crime and its impact are explored.

recommendations.title: The Mystery of Marilyn Monroe: The Unheard Tapes
recommendations.overview: This documentary explores the mystery surrounding the death of movie icon Marilyn Monroe through previously unheard interviews with her inner circle.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: Beyond Infinity: Buzz and the Journey to Lightyear
recommendations.overview: Explore the evolution of Buzz Lightyear from toy to human in the making of Pixar’s Lightyear. Dive into the origin and cultural impact of everyone’s favorite Space Ranger, the art of designing a new “human Buzz,” and the challenges faced by the Light

recommendations.title: Fahrenheit 11/9
recommendations.overview: Michael Moore's provocative documentary explores the two most important questions of the Trump Era: How did we get here, and how do we get out.

recommendations.title: Money Heist: The Phenomenon
recommendations.overview: A documentary on why 'Money Heist' sparked a wave of enthusiasm around the world for a lovable group of thieves and their professor.
